name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Balcones Heights, TX: TitleMax Title Loans at 4311 Fredericksburg Rd Ste 2 offers same-day title loans with convenient hours Mon-Fri 10AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-4PM.
description_long:
Located at 4311 Fredericksburg Rd Ste 2 in Balcones Heights, TitleMax Title Loans operates as a standalone storefront open Mon-Fri 10AM-7PM and Sat 10AM-4PM, closed Sundays. The convenient Balcones Heights location makes it easy to access during lunch or after-work hours.

This Balcones Heights, TX branch offers title loans and payday advances with quick approval. Call +1 210-785-9032 to speak with staff or visit in person during business hours for immediate assistance.

If you're a Balcones Heights resident needing emergency funds, bring your ID, proof of income, and vehicle title for a title loan application. The team provides same-day funding to help bridge the gap.
address: 4311 Fredericksburg Rd Ste 2, Balcones Heights, TX 78201

company_info.headquarters: 4311 Fredericksburg Rd Ste 2, Balcones Heights, TX 78201

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title loans
Keep your vehicle while borrowing against its title—no loss of transportation
Accepts most credit types; credit score is not the primary qualification factor
Bilingual services available at this location
Extended hours (9 AM–7 PM most weekdays; open Saturdays 9 AM–4 PM)
Flex line of credit allows withdrawal over time up to credit limit, not lump sum only
High customer satisfaction with 5.0/5 average rating across 481 Google reviews
cons: Title loans are secured debt—vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default
APR and interest rates not disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
Unsecured personal loans only available in 10 specific states; not a nationwide product
Requires clear vehicle title—excludes customers with liens, leased vehicles, or no car
No mention of debt counseling, hardship programs, or alternatives to borrowing
best_for: Vehicle owners facing unexpected emergencies who need $500–$5,000 in same-day cash and can repay within months
Borrowers with poor credit or thin credit files who have reliable income and a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle
Tennessee residents seeking flexible, ongoing credit access tied to vehicle equity rather than a fixed-term loan
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners in Tennessee who need fast emergency cash ($500–$2,000+) and can repay within a predictable timeframe. The main caveat is that title loans are high-risk secured debt—default results in vehicle repossession—and the company does not transparently disclose interest rates, making it impossible to assess true cost before applying.
services: Title Pledge (title loan)—secured loan using vehicle title as collateral
Flex Line of Credit—secured flexible line tied to vehicle value, drawdown as needed
Unsecured Personal Line of Credit—online and in-store personal loans (select states)
Online account management portal for title loans
Online account management portal for online personal loans
In-store personal loan applications and approval
Payment plan customization to keep payments manageable
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 4311 Fredericksburg Rd Ste 2, Balcones Heights, TX. Same-day title loans with convenient evening hours.
